label: M2_DCM-CatalogueRegistry
info:
Backend flows for Catalogue Registry.

MongoDB collection: cr_catalogues

Operations:
  - registerRemoteCatalog (insertOne)
  - getCatalogRegistry (find all)
  - updateRemoteCatalog (updateOne with patch)
  - deleteRemoteCatalog (deleteOne)
  - uploadCatalogJson (bulk insertMany)

Asset Types (FR-CR-02):
  - listAssetTypes (find)
  - saveAssetType (insertOne)
  - updateAssetType (updateOne with patch)
  - deleteAssetType (deleteOne)
MongoDB collection: cr_asset_types

All responses are sent back to the Dashboard via link-out → dashboard-linkin (1320340df737c22e).

name: ══ Catalogue Registry Backend ══
info:
Handles all Catalogue Registry operations.
Responses go back to Dashboard uibuilder via link-out → dashboard-linkin.
